SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 07

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. DEFT. PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. SEE COURT MINUTES OF 5/8/95 FOR DETAILS OF THE STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNERY, DOROTHY A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1367-A STEVENSON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-13-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, BOTH SIDES BEAR OWN COSTS & ATNY FEES. S/E FROM 6/6/95 TO 6/13/95 IF DFT PAYS TO PLTF $200 BY 5PM 6/6/95. IF $200 NOT PAID, PLTFF MAY SEEK EX-PARTE ORDER TO LIFT STAY AFTER 6/6. NO FURTHER STAYS AFTER 6/13/95 FOR ANY REASON. PLTF MAY RETA IN SECURITY DEPOSIT OR LAST MONTHS RENT. SEE STIPULATION.
